ideation: This animation sequence represents the vibrant energy and playful nature of the orange square emoji.  It will involve a dynamic movement where both arms move in a synchronized, almost dance-like motion. The arms will start in a neutral position, then move in a circular motion, mimicking the shape of the square, before returning to rest. This movement suggests the feeling of playful energy and excitement, which aligns with the emoji's bright and attention-grabbing color.  The sequence will use a combination of joint1 rotations and joint2 pitches to create the circular motion.  The wrists will remain neutral for simplicity and to focus attention on the arm's movement.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to play
both arms swing out and up in a playful arc
arms swing back across in a mirroring motion
arms return to rest, the square is complete
